evidence_quote: the Kia Sorento started smoking on the way home. When I got home I opened the hood and saw fire.
v2_rule_notes: 화재=결함 자체 발현(Rule① N/A). 전기화재=대체불가(Rule② CRITICAL허용). Rule③ N/A.

evidence_quote: My vehicle automatically turns on and off the check engine light and I am unsure if it's because of the safety recall.
v2_rule_notes: Rule①②③ 적용 대상 아님. 정보 부족 상태 유지.

evidence_quote: The steering wheel will sometimes pull the vehicle in a direction that does not match the road, even when lane assist is turned off.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: 차선유지 시스템 자의적 조향 개입=오작동→상향 요인. Rule②: 조향 간섭=대체불가→CRITICAL 허용. CRITICAL 유지.

evidence_quote: While driving on the freeway, the car began to lose power. As I struggled to maneuver to the right lane to pull over, something under the hood caught on fire and black smoke came billowing out.
v2_rule_notes: 화재+동력상실=결함 자체 발현(Rule① N/A). Rule②: 동력상실+화재=대체불가→CRITICAL 허용.

symptoms: 미디어 화면 깜빡임 및 오디오 오류
evidence_quote: Screen goes out when using backup camera.
v2_rule_notes: Rule②: 후방카메라=대체수단 있음→상한 SERIOUS. 이미 SERIOUS. 변화 없음.

evidence_quote: I was driving on the highway at 60/70 mph and there was nothing in front of my car. The brakes went on for a second stopping the car abruptly and I swerved.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: AEB 허위 급제동=오작동→CRITICAL 확정. Rule②: 제동=대체불가→CRITICAL 허용.

evidence_quote: after changing my oil on 10/05/24 I have had to add oil on three different times
v2_rule_notes: Rule①②③ 적용 대상 아님. 변화 없음.

evidence_quote: the front collision warning and avoidance system does not perform as advertised. If a vehicle cuts you off or you approach a vehicle too quickly the warning and braking do not intercede.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: 미작동(자의적 개입 아님)→상향 없음. Rule②: ADAS 미작동=운전자가 1차 제어자→SERIOUS 상한. 이미 SERIOUS. 변화 없음.

symptoms: 노면 충격 시 후방 차체 튐 현상
evidence_quote: Vehicle suspension in the rear feels unsettled when coming to a stop using regenerative brakes. If you hit a small pothole or recessed manhole cover the rear of the vehicle feels like the rear suspension is jumping.
v2_rule_notes: Rule①②③ 적용 대상 아님. 변화 없음.

symptoms: 어댑티브 크루즈컨트롤 자동 해제 및 감속
evidence_quote: When they are disabled the cruise control will not work and then the car just starts to slowly slow down on the the highway.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: ACC 비활성화=센서 고장으로 인한 기능 소실(미작동)→자의적 개입 아님→상향 없음. 차량 감속은 fail-safe 동작이지 능동 제동 아님. SERIOUS 유지.

symptoms: 고속 주행 중 조수석 유리 파손
evidence_quote: while driving at approximately 65 MPH, the passenger's side front window shattered into tiny pieces and fell inside the vehicle.
v2_rule_notes: 유리 파손=결함 자체 발현(Rule① N/A). Rule②: 고속 주행 중 시야 상실+파편 위험=대체불가→CRITICAL 허용.

evidence_quote: Vehicle began shifting really hard and the rpm meter started going way up and down really fast. It caused difficulties with control of the vehicle.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: 급변속=예상치 못한 변속 거동이나 '능동 개입'보다 기계적 오작동에 가까움→Rule③ 해당성 낮음. Rule②: 제어 어려움 있으나 차를 정차시킬 수 있었음→완전 동력상실 아님→SERIOUS 유지.

symptoms: FCA 감도 최소 설정 후에도 오작동 지속
evidence_quote: The FCA system detected this as a collision risk and applied hard braking on the freeway. Following traffic had to brake abruptly and I narrowly avoided being rear-ended.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: FCA 허위 급제동=오작동→CRITICAL 확정. Rule①: 추돌 위험은 직접 인과 서술됨. Rule②: 제동=대체불가→CRITICAL 허용.

symptoms: 정체 구간 AEB 허위 작동으로 급제동
AEB 작동 시 스티어링 제어권 미반환
evidence_quote: Our speed was under 25 mph and we were over a full car length back from the vehicle in front of us. I was actively braking to come to a stop due to traffic and the forward collision / emergency braking kicked in and stopped us immediately. This caused a car behind us to almost hit us and cause an accident due to sudden stopping.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: AEB 허위 급제동+스티어링 제어권 미반환=복합 오작동→CRITICAL 확정. Rule②: 제동+조향=대체불가→CRITICAL 허용.

evidence_quote: We received a Safety Recall for the Tow Hitch on our 2020 Hyundai Palisade. We took the vehicle to the dealership last summer and they removed the fuse and therefore, disabled the towing ability of the vehicle.
v2_rule_notes: Rule①②③ 적용 대상 아님. 변화 없음.

symptoms: 운전자 주의 모니터링 허위 경보 과민
evidence_quote: I almost lost control of the vehicle at freeway speeds once because the system alarmed so suddenly and loudly that it startled me.
v2_rule_notes: Rule③: 허위 경보=오작동→상향 요인. Rule①: 인과 명시('because the system alarmed...that it startled me')→반영 가능. Rule②: 경보 자체는 보조 ADAS이나 고속 주행 중 운전자 놀람→조향 상실 위험→CRITICAL 유지.

symptoms: 후방 도어 내부 손잡이 작동 불가
evidence_quote: When the car was parked, the automatic unlock for all the doors worked for both front seat passengers but not the two rear doors. The inside handles for opening the doors on both of the rear passenger doors did not open. Attempting to prior the lock mechanism on both rear doors did not work either thus I was trapped in the back seat of the vehicle.
v2_rule_notes: Rule②: 도어잠금=제동/조향/동력/계기판 외 항목→CRITICAL 요건 미충족. 탈출 불가는 위험하나 Rule② CRITICAL 허용 목록 외→SERIOUS 유지.

symptoms: 주행 중 차체 및 스티어링 떨림
evidence_quote: the accelerator pedal was depressed, but the vehicle failed to respond. The contact stated that the failure also occurred while driving at various speeds. The contact stated while driving 25 MPH, the failure recurred, and the vehicle and the steering wheel were shuddering temporarily.
v2_rule_notes: Rule②: 주행 중 동력 무반응=대체불가→CRITICAL 허용. 변화 없음.
